description: Verify deterministic multilingual evals for human judgment, coordination policy, and conversational rule scope inference.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; "$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system" eval-run --suite runtime-replay-and-multilingual --no-write > "$tmp/eval.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["status"] == "success"; assert data["passed"] == data["total"] and data["total"] >= 6' "$tmp/eval.json"
